A2 = 3*x120^4*beta - 12*x120^3*x320*beta + 18*x120^2*x320^2*beta - 12*x120*x320^3*beta + 3*x320^4*beta

B2 =  + 21*x110*x120^3*beta - 63*x110*x120^2*x320*beta + 63*x110*x120*x320^2*beta - 21*x110*x320^3*beta - 3*x120^6 + 18*x120^5*x320 - 45*x120^4*x320^2 - 21*x120^3*x310*beta + 60*x120^3*x320^3 + 63*x120^2*x310*x320*beta - 45*x120^2*x320^4 - 63*x120*x310*x320^2*beta + 18*x120*x320^5 + 21*x310*x320^3*beta - 3*x320^6

C2 =  + 57*x110^2*x120^2*beta - 114*x110^2*x120*x320*beta + 57*x110^2*x320^2*beta - 30*x110*x120^5 + 150*x110*x120^4*x320 - 300*x110*x120^3*x320^2 - 114*x110*x120^2*x310*beta + 300*x110*x120^2*x320^3 + 228*x110*x120*x310*x320*beta - 150*x110*x120*x320^4 - 114*x110*x310*x320^2*beta + 30*x110*x320^5 + 30*x120^5*x310 - 150*x120^4*x310*x320 + 300*x120^3*x310*x320^2 + 57*x120^2*x310^2*beta - 300*x120^2*x310*x320^3 - 114*x120*x310^2*x320*beta + 150*x120*x310*x320^4 + 57*x310^2*x320^2*beta - 30*x310*x320^5 

D2 = + 72*x110^3*x120*beta - 72*x110^3*x320*beta - 129*x110^2*x120^4 + 516*x110^2*x120^3*x320 - 774*x110^2*x120^2*x320^2 - 216*x110^2*x120*x310*beta + 516*x110^2*x120*x320^3 + 216*x110^2*x310*x320*beta - 129*x110^2*x320^4 + 258*x110*x120^4*x310 - 1032*x110*x120^3*x310*x320 + 1548*x110*x120^2*x310*x320^2 + 216*x110*x120*x310^2*beta - 1032*x110*x120*x310*x320^3 - 216*x110*x310^2*x320*beta + 258*x110*x310*x320^4 - 129*x120^4*x310^2 + 516*x120^3*x310^2*x320 - 774*x120^2*x310^2*x320^2 - 72*x120*x310^3*beta + 516*x120*x310^2*x320^3 + 72*x310^3*x320*beta - 129*x310^2*x320^4 

E2 = + 36*x110^4*beta - 306*x110^3*x120^3 + 918*x110^3*x120^2*x320 - 918*x110^3*x120*x320^2 - 144*x110^3*x310*beta + 306*x110^3*x320^3 + 918*x110^2*x120^3*x310 - 2754*x110^2*x120^2*x310*x320 + 2754*x110^2*x120*x310*x320^2 + 216*x110^2*x310^2*beta - 918*x110^2*x310*x320^3 - 918*x110*x120^3*x310^2 + 2754*x110*x120^2*x310^2*x320 - 2754*x110*x120*x310^2*x320^2 - 144*x110*x310^3*beta + 918*x110*x310^2*x320^3 + 306*x120^3*x310^3 - 918*x120^2*x310^3*x320 + 918*x120*x310^3*x320^2 + 36*x310^4*beta - 306*x310^3*x320^3

F2 =  - 423*x110^4*x120^2 + 846*x110^4*x120*x320 - 423*x110^4*x320^2 + 1692*x110^3*x120^2*x310 - 3384*x110^3*x120*x310*x320 + 1692*x110^3*x310*x320^2 - 2538*x110^2*x120^2*x310^2 + 5076*x110^2*x120*x310^2*x320 - 2538*x110^2*x310^2*x320^2 + 1692*x110*x120^2*x310^3 - 3384*x110*x120*x310^3*x320 + 1692*x110*x310^3*x320^2 - 423*x120^2*x310^4 + 846*x120*x310^4*x320 - 423*x310^4*x320^2

G2 =  - 324*x110^5*x120 + 324*x110^5*x320 + 1620*x110^4*x120*x310 - 1620*x110^4*x310*x320 - 3240*x110^3*x120*x310^2 + 3240*x110^3*x310^2*x320 + 3240*x110^2*x120*x310^3 - 3240*x110^2*x310^3*x320 - 1620*x110*x120*x310^4 + 1620*x110*x310^4*x320 + 324*x120*x310^5 - 324*x310^5*x320

H2 = - 108*x110^6 + 648*x110^5*x310 - 1620*x110^4*x310^2 + 2160*x110^3*x310^3 - 1620*x110^2*x310^4 + 648*x110*x310^5 - 108*x310^6
